name: drawio
description: Generate native .drawio diagrams from Codex using Mermaid or XML, with optional ELK layout, PNG/SVG/PDF export, and browser URL output.

interface.shortDescription: Create editable draw.io diagrams in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Generate native .drawio files from Mermaid or draw.io XML, optionally apply ELK layouts, export editable PNG/SVG/PDF files with embedded diagram XML, or open diagrams in the draw.io browser editor.
defaultPrompt: Create a flowchart for user login.
Draw an architecture diagram for this system.
Export this diagram as an editable SVG.
